auth.title: Sign in
auth.subtitle: Get back to your workspace in seconds.
auth.asideSubtitle: Sign in to find your documents, calculations and ongoing files.
auth.errAccountInactive: This account is inactive. Contact an administrator.
auth.errAccountLocked: Account temporarily locked after several attempts.
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email: we''ll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.forgotAsideSubtitle: A secure reset link, valid for 1 hour, will be sent to you.
auth.forgotSentBody: If an account exists for {email}, a reset link (valid for 1 hour) has just been sent.
auth.noEmailCheckSpam: No email? Check your spam folder.
auth.invalidLinkBody: This reset link is no longer valid. Make a new request.
auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetSuccess: Password reset. You can now sign in.
auth.errPasswordTooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
auth.errResetLinkInvalid: Invalid or expired link. Make a new request.
auth.signupMetaDescription: Create your DocBel account — partner (CPAS/OCMW, trade union, health insurance fund, ONEM…) or employer.
auth.employerMetaDescription: Manage your social certificates (C4, declarations) and automate your HR documents with DocBel — the modern alternative to the social secretariat.
auth.employerIntro: Manage your workers'' social certificates (C4, ONEM declarations) and automate the production of your HR documents. DocBel aims to be the modern alternative to the social secretariat: fast, freely accessible, with no paper file. Registration is done with a professional email address from your company (e.g.: firstname.lastname@your-company.be).
auth.employerCrossLink: Do you represent a CPAS, a trade union or a health insurance fund? Sign up on the partner space.
auth.partnerMetaDescription: Register your organisation (CPAS, trade union, health insurance fund, ONEM, payment institution) on the DocBel partner space.
auth.partnerIntro: Reserved for organisations that assist citizens with their administrative procedures: CPAS, trade unions, health insurance funds, ONEM and payment institutions. Registration is done with an authorised professional email address (e.g.: @cpas.brussels). If your organisation is not yet listed, contact us.
auth.partnerCrossLink: Are you an employer (HR management, social certificates)? Sign up on the employer space.
auth.signupVatHelp: Belgian VAT number of your company — validated (checksum) and unique per account.
auth.signupTerms: By signing up, you accept DocBel''s terms of use.
auth.signupSentBody: An email has been sent to {email} with an activation link valid for 24 hours.
auth.signupNoEmailReceived: No email received? Check your spam folder or contact us.
auth.signupPartnerUnknownDomain: This domain is not authorised for the partner space. Contact DocBel to list your organisation (CPAS, trade union, health insurance fund…).
auth.signupEmployerUnknownDomain: This domain is not yet authorised for the employer space. Contact DocBel to activate your company.
auth.errSegmentMismatch: This address corresponds to a {segment}. Sign up on the dedicated page.
auth.errInvalidTva: Invalid Belgian VAT number (expected format: BE0123456789).
auth.errNetwork: Network error. Try again in a moment.
auth.splitSubtitle: Create your professional workspace in seconds.
auth.splitTaglinePartner: CPAS, trade unions, health insurance funds, ONEM and payment bodies — you support citizens.
auth.splitTaglineEmployer: HR management, social certificates (C4…) and document automation.
auth.confirmNetworkError: Network error. Please try again in a moment.
auth.confirmVerifyingBody: We are checking your activation link. This only takes a few seconds.
auth.confirmSuccessBody: Your email address is confirmed. You can now sign in to your partner area.

chrome.searchPlaceholder: Search for a tool, a guide, a law…
chrome.palettePlaceholder: Search for a tool, a guide, a space…

contact.title: A question? Write to us.
contact.intro: We usually reply within 48 working hours. For urgent matters related to an ONEM file, contact your local office directly.
contact.successBody: Thank you for getting in touch. Our team will reply within 48 working hours.
contact.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your request in a few lines…
contact.consent: I agree that my data may be used to respond to this request. No information is shared with any third party.
contact.cardResponseBody: Within 48 working hours for general questions.
contact.cardPrivacyBody: Your data is used only to respond to your message.
contact.cardUrgentTitle: Do you have an urgent file?
contact.cardUrgentBody: Contact your ONEM office or your payment institution directly.

contenu.newsMetaDescription: Stay informed about useful updates, reforms and administrative changes.
contenu.changelogMetaDescription: Follow the new features, fixes and improvements made to Docbel.
contenu.changelogIntro: All the new features, fixes and improvements shipped on Docbel, sorted from the most recent to the oldest.
contenu.formDisabledDefaultMessage: Our team has paused it on purpose, either to fix an error or to apply an update to the official document. It will be back online as soon as possible.
contenu.formDisabledTitleSuffix: is not accessible at the moment.
contenu.formDisabledReportLead: Were you hoping to finish your procedure now?
contenu.articleUnsaved: Article removed from your saved items
contenu.articleContentUnavailable: The content of this article is not available yet.
contenu.pressIntro: ONEM announcements, unemployment reforms, CPAS updates and other Belgian administrative changes.
contenu.emptyHint: Try another category or a shorter keyword.
contenu.feedCount: {count, plural, =0 {# article in the feed} one {# article in the feed} other {# articles in the feed}}

dossier.docsToPrepare: {count} {count, plural, one {document to prepare} other {documents to prepare}}
dossier.monDossierMetaDescription: Create or find the right Belgian administrative file: let yourself be guided through a few questions, or go straight to the file you need.
dossier.monDossierIntro: Let yourself be guided through a few simple questions, or go straight to the file you need.
dossier.directAccessSubtitle: Search or browse your files by category.
dossier.searchPlaceholder: Search for a file (e.g.: unemployment, RCC, integration…)
dossier.emptyNoneTitle: No file has been published yet.
dossier.emptyNoneBody: The files are not available yet. Please try again in a moment.
dossier.emptyNoMatchBody: Try another keyword, or start the guide on the left.
dossier.helpFindRightDossier: How do I find the right file?
dossier.tipBody: Prepare your information before you start: your login details, documents and personal information.
dossier.privacyNote: Your data stays confidential and is never shared.
dossier.onboardingMetaDescription: Start your Belgian administrative file from a simple situation: « I have lost my job », « I am becoming self-employed », etc.
dossier.onboardingIntro: Describe your situation in plain language or choose a life event below. Beldoc suggests a tailored path with the right documents to prepare.
dossier.onboardingEmptyTitle: No life-event path has been published yet.
dossier.onboardingEmptyBody: Administrators have not yet enabled the highlighting of bundles on this page. You can use the search above or browse the catalogue.
dossier.onboardingResumeTitle: Have you already started a file?
dossier.onboardingRgpdNotice: No personal data is kept beyond the processing of your file. If you close your browser, be sure to keep the resume code that appears as soon as you first save — without this code, the data you entered will be lost.
dossier.profilIntro: This information automatically pre-fills your forms. It is never shared with a third party.
dossier.reprendreMetaDescription: Resume your file in progress by entering the resume code you received when it was created.
dossier.reprendreTitle: Resume your file where you left off.
dossier.reprendreIntro: If you started a file on this device, it resumes automatically. If you change computer or have cleared your cookies, enter below the resume code you received when starting the file.
dossier.resumeHasCodeBody: The code was shown when the file was started and may have been sent to you by email on request. It looks like BELDOC-A1B2-C3D4.
dossier.resumeFormatHint: Expected format: BELDOC followed by two groups of 4 characters.
dossier.resumeNoCodeBody: No worries — start a new file from the onboarding home page. A resume code will be offered to you as soon as you first save.
dossier.resumeNoCodeNote: No personal data is kept. The code expires after 30 days without activity, and the data entered is deleted.
dossier.resumeFormatError: The code must be in the format BELDOC-XXXX-XXXX.
dossier.resumeExpiredError: This code has expired. The associated data has been deleted. Start a new file.
dossier.resumeNotFoundError: No file found for this code. Check what you entered.
dossier.resumeRateLimitedError: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
dossier.intentPlaceholder: Describe your situation in a few words (« I have lost my job », « bad weather »…)
dossier.intentRateLimited: Too many searches — please wait a few seconds.
dossier.intentError: The search could not be processed.
dossier.intentNoSuggestions: No obvious path for this query. Try other keywords or browse the life events below.
dossier.intentDisclaimer: This suggestion does not bind the administration — always check with the relevant official organisation.
dossier.bannerBody: Without this code, you will not be able to resume your file from another device or after clearing your cookies. No personal data is kept: if you do not save it, the information entered will be lost after {expiresAt}.
dossier.bannerCopyError: Cannot copy — select the code manually
dossier.prequalTitle: A few questions before you start
dossier.prequalIntro: To point you to the right documents — and to warn you if a special case applies. Your answers are indicative only.
dossier.prequalVerdictDisclaimer: This indication does not bind the competent administration — always check with the official organisation. You can continue building the file in any case.
dossier.prequalAnsweredCount: {answered} of {total} {total, plural, one {question} other {questions}} {answered, plural, one {answered} other {answered}}.
dossier.allocIntro: Three pieces of information for a rough idea. This is not a decision: only the ONEM sets your actual amount.
dossier.allocRateDetail: ({rate}% of salary{capped, select, yes { capped} other {}}, {period})
dossier.allocHintTouched: Enter a realistic gross monthly salary (in euros) to see an estimate.
dossier.allocHintEmpty: Enter your gross monthly salary to estimate your benefit.
dossier.wizardChooseSituationFirst: First choose your situation so we can guide you.
dossier.wizardAssistantSubtitle: Answer a few questions to find the right file.
dossier.wizardHesitateDryRun: Not sure? A payment organisation can help you.
dossier.wizardHesitate: Not sure? <link>Get help from a payment organisation</link>.
dossier.wizardSituationHelp: Choose the situation that best matches you.
dossier.wizardClickAnswerHint: Click an answer to see the recommended file.
dossier.wizardRefineHint: One more detail to guide you as well as possible.
dossier.wizardUnavailableInfo: This file is under construction. In the meantime, you can contact the service via <link>/contact</link>.
dossier.wizardFooterDisclaimer: This guide points you to the right procedure — it does not calculate your rights or amounts.
dossier.runnerLetterSuccess: Letter generated — remember to complete, sign and send it.
dossier.runnerResetDescription: Your current progress will be erased (questionnaire answers + documents in progress). Documents already downloaded stay on your device.
dossier.runnerCompletedCount: {completed} of {count} {count, plural, one {document completed} other {documents completed}}
dossier.runnerStartHint: Click a document to start your path. Documents that depend on your answers will appear as you go.
dossier.runnerAllRequiredDone: All the required documents for this path are complete.
dossier.runnerPendingHint: First complete the previous documents to find out whether this one is required.
dossier.runnerExternalDocsTitle: Documents to be provided by a third party ({count})
dossier.runnerExternalDocsNote: These documents are required for the file but you cannot fill them in yourself. Remember to request them as soon as possible.
dossier.runnerHiddenDocsTitle: Documents not required for your situation ({count})
dossier.rdvMetaDescription: Make an appointment with a Belgian social organisation in a few clicks.
dossier.rdvIntro: Select your procedure and your organisation to choose an available slot.
dossier.rdvPostalCodeHelp: Helps direct you to the nearest branch.
dossier.guichetsMetaDescription: Browse the organisations and public services that offer online appointment booking.
dossier.guichetsIntro: The organisations and services that offer online appointment booking. Choose yours to reserve a slot.
dossier.guichetsEmpty: No desk is available at the moment.
dossier.manageSlotsLoadError: Unable to load the available slots.
dossier.manageNotFound: Appointment not found. The link may have expired or be incorrect.
dossier.manageNoOtherSlots: No other slot is available at the moment.
dossier.manageCancelConfirm: Do you confirm the cancellation of this appointment?

formations.metaCatalogueDescription: Free or paid training programmes offered by verified partners, to move forward in your job, your administrative steps or your career change.
formations.metaBoussoleDescription: Not sure which training to choose? Answer a few simple questions: Docbel helps you identify the fields that suit your situation.
formations.metaMyTrainingsDescription: Your enrolments, saved training and guidance results.
formations.heroTitle: Find the training that moves you forward.
formations.heroSubtitle: Free or paid training programmes offered by verified partners, for your job, your administrative steps or your career change.
formations.searchPlaceholder: Search for a training, an organisation…
formations.emptyHint: Try broadening your search, or launch the Compass to get recommendations suited to your profile.
formations.introTitle: Not sure which training to choose?
formations.introBody: Answer a few simple questions. Docbel helps you identify the fields that seem to suit your situation best. There is no wrong answer — you can answer « I do not know ».
formations.introMeta: {total} questions · about 2 minutes · this result is a guidance aid, it does not decide for you.
formations.resultSummarySuffix: These are paths to explore, not a fixed decision.
formations.resultRecommendedEmpty: We do not yet have enough training matching your profile. Here are nonetheless the fields that seem to suit you best — come back soon, the catalogue keeps growing.
formations.errorGenericRetry: An error occurred. Please try again.
formations.privateBannerInternal: Training internal to an organisation — you have access to it.
formations.privateBannerPrivate: Private training — you have access to it.
formations.noOpenSession: No session open for enrolment at the moment.
formations.noOpenSessionContact: Contact the organiser to be kept informed.
formations.paymentNotice: Payment is made to the organiser, not via Docbel.
formations.enrollFullNotice: This session is full — your request will join the waiting list.
formations.enrollConsent: I agree that my contact details be passed on to the organiser to process my request.
formations.enrollWaitlisted: You are on the waiting list. We will notify you if a seat becomes available.
formations.enrollAccepted: Enrolment confirmed! You will receive the details by email.
formations.enrollRequested: Request sent! The organiser will review it.
formations.reportSuccess: Thank you, your report has been sent to Docbel.
formations.certValidSubtitle: This document was indeed issued via Docbel.
formations.certRevokedOrExpired: This certificate has been revoked or has expired.
formations.certNoMatch: No certificate matches this verification code.
formations.mySubtitle: Your enrolments, your saved training and your guidance results.
formations.loginHintSuffix: to find your enrolments and your results on all your devices.
formations.myEmptyTitle: You do not have any training yet.
formations.privateNoticeBodyInternal: This training is reserved for members of an organisation. If you think you should have access to it, contact the organiser or Docbel.
formations.privateNoticeBodyPrivate: This training is private. If you think you should have access to it, contact the organiser or Docbel.
formations.gateMaintenanceText: The Training module is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
formations.gateComingSoonText: The Training module is coming to Docbel very soon. Come back soon!
formations.gateForbiddenText: The Training module is currently restricted.

glossaire.metaDescription: Definitions of the acronyms used by the Belgian administration: ONEM, CAPAC, RIS, AGR, C4, BCE and many more.
glossaire.title: What is this acronym?
glossaire.searchPlaceholder: Type your acronym, a word, a situation…
glossaire.suggestionsLabel: You may have been looking for
glossaire.missingHint: If an administrative acronym is missing, report it via the contact page — we will add it.

home.fallbackTitle: The C1 form can now be filed online for 12 months.
home.fallbackDesc: The ONEM is simplifying the procedure: you now have a full year to submit your benefits claim from the online space. We explain it all in 6 minutes.
home.searchOpenLabel: Open search — shortcut {modifier, select, cmd {Command} ctrl {Ctrl} other {Ctrl}} K
home.wizardTitle: Find the right dossier in just a few questions
home.wizardDescription: Choose the situation that fits you: the guide asks you one to three questions, then points you to the right dossier — no jargon, and you can go back at any time.
home.dossierDocCount: Dossier · {count, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}}
home.resource1Title: Filing an unemployment claim in 5 steps
home.resource3Title: Preparing your RIS dossier at the CPAS
home.resource4Title: Temporary unemployment: the steps to follow
home.simErrInvalidBrut: Enter a realistic gross monthly salary (more than {min} €).
home.simErrGeneric: Estimate not possible with these values.
home.simResultMonthly: i.e. ~{amount} €/month ({rate} % of salary{capped, select, yes { capped} other {}})
home.simDisclaimer: Indicative estimate — only the ONEM decision is binding.
home.trustPoint1: No personal data is kept: your dossier stays anonymous.
home.trustPoint2: An anonymous resume code is enough to find your dossier on another device — without creating an account.
home.trustPoint3: Automatic expiry: the code is valid for 30 days; after that, the information entered is lost.
home.resumeProgress: {completed, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}} of {total} {completed, plural, one {completed} other {completed}}
home.resumeProgressAria: Progress: {completed, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}} of {total}
home.resumeDismiss: Hide this bar for this session

outils.noMatchHint: Try a different filter or a shorter keyword.
outils.toolsCount: {count, plural, =0 {# tool} one {# tool} other {# tools}}
outils.toolsShown: {count, plural, =0 {# tool shown} one {# tool shown} other {# tools shown}}
outils.catalogIntro: Official forms, calculators and simulators for your Belgian administrative procedures. Filter by category or search by keyword.
outils.helpBody: Answer a few questions and we will suggest the right tools for you.
outils.favEmptyBody: Tap the ♥ in the list below to keep your tools here.
outils.notFoundBody: The requested tool is not available in the public catalogue. It may have been renamed or removed.
outils.disabledTitle: is not accessible at the moment.
outils.disabledBody: Our team has deliberately paused it. It will either be fixed and put back online after an update, or removed permanently if it is no longer relevant. Thank you for your patience.
outils.disabledReport: Was a tool that vanished without notice blocking you? <report>Report it</report> and we will take care of it.
outils.cpIntro: Minimum guaranteed salaries by joint committee (CP) — indicative 2026 figures. Always check the official sector CCT.
outils.cpSearchPlaceholder: Search for a sector or CP number…
outils.baremeIntro: The ONEM scales in force, by code and bracket. Choose a sheet to view the detailed amounts, filter and export.
outils.baremeEmptyBody: The amounts will appear here as soon as an official scale is put online.
outils.baremeSheetEmptyBody: No data published for « {label} » at the moment.
outils.bureauxIntro: Enter your postcode — we will tell you straight away which ONEM, CPAS, payment institution and legal aid are responsible for you. Official ONEM data, updated regularly.
outils.bnIntro: Quick estimate of the gross → net monthly conversion for a Belgian employee. Reverse calculation also possible with the Net → Gross mode. Includes company car (ATN) and remote-working allowance — 2026 figures, see disclaimer.
outils.bnInputHintBrut: Amount shown on your payslip before deductions.
outils.bnInputHintNet: The calculation looks for the gross that produces this net (bisection method).
outils.bnRegionHint: Marginal impact on the monthly withholding tax.
outils.bnFooterUpdated: Calculator updated on {date} · 2026 data · Compliant with Annex III AR/CIR 92 · Sources: SPF Finances and ONSS.
outils.bnResultInfoTitle: Indicative estimate based on the 2026 scales
outils.bnPanelDisclaimer: Indicative estimate — simplified 2026 figures. The car ATN uses the average CO2 coefficients and the official age reduction (AR 14/01/2014). The exact withholding tax depends on your precise tax situation.
outils.bnPlaceholderText: Enter an amount and click « Calculate {mode} » to see the breakdown.
outils.bnPdfVoitureValeur: Company car — catalogue value excl. VAT
outils.bnPdfDisclaimer: Indicative estimate — 2026 figures compliant with the SPF Finances scale (Annex III AR/CIR 92) and the official ONSS rates. The exact withholding tax depends on your precise tax situation (double holiday pay, multiple ATN, special contributions). Final adjustment via Tax-on-web.
outils.pvErrDateOrder: The dismissal date must be after the start date
outils.pvErrSalaireEmployePre2014: Annual salary required for employees before 2014
outils.pvIclReason: Dismissal Compensation Indemnity (ICL): the difference of {jours} days between the old and new schemes must be compensated by an indemnity equal to this difference × net daily salary.
outils.pvDetailUnifie: Unified scheme 2014+ · {semaines} weeks ({rupture, select, licenciement {dismissal} demission {resignation} other {dismissal}})
outils.pvSubtitle: Calculate your notice period under Belgian law
outils.pvCommissionPlaceholder: Search for a CP: number or sector…
outils.pvTooltipDateEntree: Start date of the current contract (in DD/MM/YYYY format).
outils.pvTooltipDateLicenciement: Date the termination was notified (in DD/MM/YYYY format).
outils.pvSalaireHint: For pre-2014 employees, the notice period depends on the gross annual salary (thresholds 32,254 € / 64,508 €).
outils.pvDisclaimer: Simulation provided for information only. The result depends on the information entered and does not replace legal advice.
outils.pvFooter: Calculator updated on {date} · SPF Emploi scales (CCT 75 pre-2014, Law of 26 December 2013 post-2014) · Official sources: SPF Emploi, Travail et Concertation sociale.
outils.pvResultInfoTooltip: Indicative estimate based on the SPF Emploi scales
outils.pvNoticeBullet1: Suspension possible during certain absences (paid leave, maternity, illness, work accident).
outils.pvNoticeBullet2: This calculation is indicative and may vary depending on sector CCTs or individual agreements.
outils.pvPlaceholderBody: Enter your status, your joint committee and the two dates, then click « Calculate the notice period ».
outils.pvPdfDaysRegime: i.e. {jours} days · {regime, select, avant {before 2014} apres {after 2014} other {before 2014}} scheme
outils.pvPdfDisclaimer: Indicative estimate based on the official SPF Emploi scales (CCT 75 pre-2014, Law of 26 December 2013 post-2014). The exact period may vary depending on sector agreements, individual agreements or particular circumstances. Consult your trade union or a legal adviser before taking any action.
outils.choIntro: Estimate your monthly unemployment benefit based on your last salary, your family situation and the ONEM degressivity phase. Belgian amounts decrease over time.
outils.choSalaireHint: Your last reference salary before unemployment.
outils.choPhaseHint: The longer the period, the lower the benefit.
outils.choInfo: Unemployment in Belgium is degressive: rates and ceilings fall progressively (months 1-3 → 4-6 → 7-12 → 13-24 → year 2-3 → beyond). The final amount is capped by a flat-rate minimum and maximum depending on the family situation.
outils.choFooter: Indicative estimate based on the simplified 2026 ONEM scales. The actual amount factors in your career, the withholding tax and any supplements. Source: ONEM. For your exact case, contact your payment institution (CAPAC, trade union).
outils.pecErrorBrut: Enter a valid gross monthly amount.
outils.pecSubtitle: Calculate your single and double holiday pay — Belgium 2026
outils.pecMoisHint: From 0 to 12. Illness, maternity leave and temporary unemployment count as worked.
outils.pecTauxHint: E.g. 80 for a 4/5, 50 for half time.
outils.pecJeuneHint: If yes and under 25: youth holiday from ONEM possible (info in the result).
outils.pecDisclaimer: Indicative simulation. The actual holiday pay depends on your payslip (employee) or the official ONVA statement (blue-collar worker).
outils.pecFooter: Calculator updated on {date} · 2026 data · Official sources: ONVA, SPF Finances and ONSS.
outils.pecResultInfoTitle: Indicative estimate — SPF Finances and ONVA 2026 scales
outils.pecVersementEmploye: paid by the employer in June
outils.pecJeunesText: As a young worker (under 25) in your first year after studies, ONEM may top up your holiday pay (up to 4 weeks at 65% of the capped salary) if 2025 was not enough to build up full holiday pay. Apply via the C103 form, to be sent to ONEM before the end of February 2026.
outils.pecKnowEmployeSimple: The single holiday pay is included in your June salary (employee) — not a separate supplement.
outils.pecKnowEmployeDouble: The double holiday pay ({tauxDouble} of the gross) breaks down into 85% « legal » (subject to ONSS 13.07%) + 7% « supplement » (without ONSS), then follows the 11-bracket SPF « holiday pay » scale — {taux} here.
outils.pecKnowEmployeAssimiles: Assimilated days (illness, temporary unemployment, maternity leave) count as worked.
outils.pecKnowOuvrierOnva: ONVA pays in May/June {taux} of the increased annual gross ({coef} ×).
outils.pecKnowOuvrierRetenue: Total deduction: {total} = ONSS {onss} + solidarity {solidarite} + withholding tax {precompteBas} if holiday pay ≤ {seuil}, otherwise {precompteHaut}.
outils.pecKnowOuvrierAssimiles: Assimilated days (illness, maternity leave) count as worked.
outils.pecPlaceholder: Enter your status, your gross monthly salary and the months worked in 2025, then click « Calculate the holiday pay ».
outils.pecPdfRowPrecompte: Special withholding tax on double holiday pay
outils.pecPdfJeunesText: As a young worker in your first year after studies (under 25), ONEM may top up your holiday pay (up to 4 weeks at 65% of the capped salary). Application to be submitted via the C103 form, to be sent to ONEM before the end of February 2026.
outils.pecPdfFooter: Indicative estimate — 2026 figures compliant with the SPF Finances « holiday pay and exceptional allowances » scale (Annex III AR/CIR 92, points 53-55), the official ONVA rates (15.38% of the gross increased by 1.08) and the ONSS (13.07%). Final adjustment via the payslip (employee) or the official ONVA statement (blue-collar worker).
outils.indSubtitle: Notice not worked — Law of 3 July 1978
outils.indSalaireHint: Amount shown on your payslip before deductions.
outils.indPreavisHint: See the notice period calculator for this value (weeks).
outils.indAvantagesToggleHint: Year-end bonus, double holiday pay, annual meal vouchers, group insurance, company car…
outils.indAvantagesFieldHint: Estimated annual total (€/year). Spread monthly (÷ 12) then added to the base remuneration.
outils.indProtFemmeEnceinteHint: Law of 16 March 1971, art. 40: 6 flat-rate months.
outils.indProtDelegueHint: CCT no. 5, art. 20: 2 to 4 years depending on seniority.
outils.indProtConseillerHint: Law of 19 March 1991: 6 to 12 months depending on seniority.
outils.indPrecompteToggleHint: Cumulative special withholding tax based on your annual income bracket (SPF Finances 2026 scale).
outils.indErrSalaire: Enter a valid gross monthly salary.
outils.indErrPreavis: Enter a notice length in weeks.
outils.indDisclaimer: Indicative estimate. The actual withholding tax depends on your individual tax situation (dependants, spouse, etc.). For an official calculation, contact your social secretariat or consult SPF Emploi.
outils.indFooterUpdated: Calculator updated on {date} · 2026 data · Official sources:
outils.indSourceOnss: ONSS — Special contribution on severance pay
outils.indSourceEmploi: SPF Emploi — End of the employment contract
outils.indResultInfoTooltip: Indicative estimate — Law of 3 July 1978, SPF Finances 2026 scale, special ONSS contribution 2026/1
outils.indCotisationTexte: The employer bears {x} to the Closure Fund (ONSS 2026/1). This contribution is borne by the employer and does not affect your net.
outils.indASavoir1: The special withholding tax is calculated by brackets of reference annual income (17.16 → 53.50%) — SPF Finances 2026 scale.
outils.indASavoir2: The special ONSS contribution (1 / 2 / 3%) is owed by the employer when the annual remuneration is ≥ 50,166 €. It funds the Closure Fund.
outils.indASavoir3: The protection indemnity (pregnant woman, union representative, prevention adviser) is exempt from social contributions.
outils.indASavoir4: The portion of the indemnity covering work performed before 01/01/2014 is exempt from the special employer contribution.
outils.indPdfCotisationOnss: ONSS 2026/1 — does not affect the employee''s net
outils.indPdfFooterDisclaimer: Indicative estimate — Law of 3 July 1978 (art. 39 et seq.), special withholding tax scale SPF Finances 2026 by brackets (5 tiers, 17.16 → 53.50%), special employer compensation contribution ONSS 2026/1 (1 / 2 / 3% depending on gross annual ≥ 50,166 / 61,437 / 72,707 €), cumulative protection indemnity (Law 16/03/1971, CCT 5, Law 19/03/1991). For an official and personalised calculation: SPF Emploi / your social secretariat. Sources: SPF Finances, ONSS, Moniteur belge.
outils.indPlaceholder: Enter your gross monthly salary and the length of notice not worked, then click « Calculate the indemnity ».
outils.penErrCarriere: Enter a valid number of career years.
outils.penErrAssimilees: Enter a valid number of assimilated years (or leave blank).
outils.penErrSalaire: Enter a valid average annual salary.
outils.penHintDateNaissance: Automatically determines the statutory age (65, 66 or 67 depending on the Law of 10/08/2015).
outils.penHintCarriere: Years actually worked — excluding assimilated periods.
outils.penHintAssimilees: Unemployment, illness, parental leave, military service, recognised time credit.
outils.penHintSalaire: Average over the whole career (not the last salary). Capped at 69,521 €/year in 2026.
outils.penHintAgeDepart: Between 60 and 70. Early retirement requires a minimum career.
outils.penToggleHint: Household rate (75%) if the spouse has no sufficient income of their own. Otherwise single rate (60%).
outils.penFormDisclaimer: Indicative estimate. For the official and personalised calculation, based on your complete career account, go to mypension.be.
outils.penFooter: Calculator updated on {date} · 2026 data · Official sources: SFP (Service Fédéral des Pensions), mypension.be, Moniteur belge.
outils.penIneligFallback: Early pension is not available before age 60.
outils.penIneligInfo: The calculation above is done at the statutory age ({age}) for information.
outils.penKnow1: Your official career account can be viewed on mypension.be (itsme login).
outils.penKnow2: Assimilated periods (compensated unemployment, long-term illness, parental leave, military service, recognised time credit) count towards the career.
outils.penKnow3: The employee scheme provides no bonus for long careers (over 45 years): the formula caps at 45/45.
outils.penPlaceholderBody: Enter your date of birth, your career and your average salary, then click « Estimate my pension ».
outils.penPdfAnnualHint: That is approximately {amount} / year (gross, before tax)
outils.penPdfFooterDisclaimer: Indicative estimate — official SFP formula (rate × career / 45). 2026 salary ceiling and guaranteed minimum after March 2026 indexation. Early retirement conditions compliant with the Law of 10 August 2015. For the official and personalised calculation: mypension.be. Sources: SFP, mypension.be, Moniteur belge.
outils.afRegionWallonieHint: Reference public fund: FAMIWAL (or an approved private fund in Wallonia).
outils.afRegionBruxellesHint: Reference public fund: FAMIRIS (or an approved private fund in Brussels).
outils.afRegionFlandreHint: Groeipakket scheme (« growth package ») managed by Opgroeien.
outils.afRegionGermanophoneHint: Kindergeld scheme managed by the Ministerium der Deutschsprachigen Gemeinschaft.
outils.afErrorNoChild: Add at least one child to calculate.
outils.afSubtitle: Estimate your monthly benefit — 4 regional schemes 2026
outils.afFieldRevenuHint: Cumulative taxable income. Used to calculate social supplements.
outils.afFieldMonoHint: A single adult bears the responsibility for the household.
outils.afFieldHandicapHint: Median category (~141 €/month). The actual amount ranges from 93 to 621 €.
outils.afDisclaimerBody: Indicative estimate. The exact amount depends on your precise date of birth and the complete file of your regional fund.
outils.afFooter: Calculator updated on {date} · 2026 data · Official sources: FAMIWAL, FAMIRIS, Groeipakket and Kindergeld DG.
outils.afResultInfoTitle: Indicative estimate — FAMIWAL / FAMIRIS / Groeipakket / DG 2026 scales
outils.afPerMonth: / month for {count, plural, one {# child} other {# children}}
outils.afKnowRegion: The scales differ depending on the region and the date of birth (« old » scheme before 2019/2020 vs « new »).
outils.afKnowHandicap: The disability supplement shown corresponds to the median category. The actual amount ranges from 93 € (moderate impairment) to 621 € (severe disability) depending on the AVIQ / Iriscare / Opgroeien points.
outils.afKnowContact: For the exact amount, contact your fund: FAMIWAL (Wallonia), FAMIRIS (Brussels), Groeipakket (Flanders), Ministerium DG (Ostbelgien).
outils.afPlaceholder: Select your region, add your children and enter the household income, then click « Calculate the benefit ».
outils.afPdfTotalSub: Paid each month by your fund · Back-to-school bonus {x}/year
outils.afPdfChildHeading: Child {rang} — {count, plural, one {# year} other {# years}}
outils.afPdfFooter: Indicative estimate — 2026 scales compliant with the official bodies FAMIWAL (Wallonia), FAMIRIS (Brussels), Groeipakket (Flanders) and Kindergeld DG (Ostbelgien). For the exact amount, contact your fund. The disability supplement uses the median category value (moderate) — the actual amount depends on the AVIQ/Iriscare/Opgroeien points.
outils.tsSubtitle: Check your eligibility + estimate the annual saving ({q})
outils.tsStatusHandicapDesc: DG Persons with Disabilities (SPF Sécurité Sociale).
outils.tsStatusAideLabel: Equivalent social aid from the CPAS
outils.tsStatusAideDesc: Equivalent to the RIS for people not eligible for the RIS.
outils.tsStatusLogementDesc: Tenant of an SLSP / SLRB / VMSW with collective gas heating.
outils.tsStatusBimDesc: BIM alone NO LONGER grants the right since 01.07.2023.
outils.tsSection1Help: Tick all the statuses that apply to your household. Just one is enough for the social tariff to be applied automatically.
outils.tsFieldMenageHint: Electricity ceiling: +200 kWh per additional person.
outils.tsFieldElecHint: See your last annual bill. BE average ≈ 3,500 kWh.
outils.tsFieldGazHint: 0 if you have no natural gas. BE average ≈ 17,000 kWh.
outils.tsFieldChauffageElecHint: Electricity ceiling: {x} kWh if yes (otherwise {y} kWh).
outils.tsFieldChauffageGazHint: Gas ceiling: {x} kWh if yes (otherwise {y} kWh).
outils.tsDisclaimerAuto: Automatic application. SPF Économie checks your eligibility 4× a year and automatically notifies your supplier — no action required.
outils.tsFooter: Calculator updated on {date} · {q} tariffs · Official sources: CREG, SPF Économie, Moniteur belge.
outils.tsResultInfoTitle: Indicative estimate — CREG {q} scales, AR 29/03/2012 ceilings, SPF Économie 2026 list
outils.tsEligibleBlockItem1: SPF Économie notifies your supplier every 3 months.
outils.tsEligibleBlockItem3: Beyond the ceilings, the standard tariff applies to the excess only.
outils.tsNotEligibleBlockItem2: Gas and electricity fund via your CPAS.
outils.tsNotEligibleBlockItem3: Heating allowance (heating oil, propane gas, pellets) subject to conditions.
outils.tsPlaceholderInstruction: Tick your eligible statuses, enter your consumption, then click « Check my eligibility ».
outils.tsPdfEligibleTitle: YOU ARE ELIGIBLE FOR THE SOCIAL TARIFF
outils.tsPdfNotEligibleHint: Check the regional aids and the CPAS support.
outils.tsPdfGainTheorique: Theoretical gain: {x}/year had you been eligible.
outils.tsPdfCoutStandard: Annual cost at the standard tariff
outils.tsPdfCoutSocial: Annual cost at the social tariff
outils.tsPdfFooter: Indicative estimate — CREG {q} tariffs (quarterly note) and SPF Économie 2026 list of beneficiaries. BIM status alone no longer grants the right to the automatic social tariff since 1 July 2023. To confirm your eligibility, contact your supplier or consult economie.fgov.be.
outils.ippErrEnfants: The number of children must be a positive whole number.
outils.ippErrAutres: The number of other dependants must be a positive whole number.
outils.ippSubtitle: Federal IPP simulator — tax year 2026 (2025 income)
outils.ippRevenuHint: Income after ONSS and flat-rate professional expenses. For an employee: approximately gross annual salary × 0.73.
outils.ippStatutHint: The marital quotient applies automatically if « married — single income » (Art. 134 CIR 92).
outils.ippAutresHint: Elderly parent, grandparent, brother/sister 66+ who is dependent. 1,980 €/person (generic case).
outils.ippParentIsoleLabel: Single parent (sole recipient) with dependent child(ren)
outils.ippParentIsoleDesc: Tax-free allowance supplement of 1,980 € (SPF Finances EI 2026).
outils.ippAdditionnelHint: Belgian average ≈ 7.5%. City of Brussels 7%, Antwerp 7%, Liège 8%, Charleroi 8.5%. Varies by municipality.
outils.ippReductionsIntro: Enter the annual amounts actually paid or spent. The simulator applies the standard rate for each item (pension saving 30%, service vouchers ≈ 15%, donations 45%, mortgage loan ≈ 30%, childcare 45%).
outils.ippTitresServicesHint: Ceiling {plafond}. Actual rate: Wallonia 10%, Brussels 15%, Flanders 20% (average 15%).
outils.ippPretHypoHint: Average regional housing cheque ≈ 30%. Varies by region and date of borrowing.
outils.ippGardeEnfantsHint: Children under 14 (under 21 if disabled). 45% reduction, ceiling 16.40 €/day/child.
outils.ippDisclaimer: Educational estimate. For the official and personalised calculation (movable and immovable income, maintenance payments, employment bonus, regional specifics), go to Tax-on-web.
outils.ippFooter: Calculator updated on {date} · Tax year 2026 (2025 income) · Official sources: SPF Finances, Tax-on-web, Moniteur belge — CIR 92, ONSS.
outils.ippASavoirTaxOnWeb: The official calculation is done on Tax-on-web (SPF Finances) — itsme/eID login.
outils.ippASavoirAdditionnel: The municipal surcharge ranges from 0 to 9% depending on the municipality (Belgian average ≈ 7.5%).
outils.ippASavoirQuotite: The basic tax-free allowance is {value} + supplements per dependant (Art. 131 and 132 CIR 92).
outils.ippASavoirQuotientConjugal: The marital quotient applied here is an estimate: transfer ceiling {value} (Art. 134 CIR 92).
outils.ippMarginal50Title: You are in the 50% marginal bracket
outils.ippMarginal50Body: Beyond {seuil}, each additional euro is taxed at 50%. Movable income, pension saving and donations open up attractive reductions — explore the legal tax optimisations on Tax-on-web.
outils.ippPlaceholderPrompt: Enter your annual taxable income and your family situation, then click « Calculate my tax ».
outils.ippPdfTauxResume: Average rate {tauxMoyen}% · Marginal rate {tauxMarginal}% · Net income {revenuNet}/year
outils.ippPdfFooterDisclaimer: Educational estimate — federal IPP scale tax year 2026 (2025 income), tax-free allowance 10,910 € (art. 131 CIR 92), child supplements 1,980 / 5,110 / 11,440 / 18,510 / +7,070 € (art. 132), marital quotient capped at 13,460 € (art. 134), special social security contribution (Law 30/03/1994). For the official and personalised calculation: Tax-on-web (SPF Finances).
outils.kmTransportTP: Public transport (SNCB / STIB / TEC / De Lijn)
outils.kmErrJours: Enter a valid number of days per week.
outils.kmErrSemaines: Enter a valid number of weeks per year.
outils.kmErrAbonnement: Enter the annual cost of your season ticket.
outils.kmSubtitle: 2026 tax deduction — car, bicycle, public transport
outils.kmHintDistanceVoiture: Car / carpooling: preferential rate up to 100 km one way; beyond that = 0.15 €/km.
outils.kmHintDistanceAutre: One-way journey — multiplied × 2 for the return.
outils.kmHintJours: Days physically present at work (excluding remote working).
outils.kmHintMode: In case of a combination (e.g. car + train), choose the predominant mode.
outils.kmFieldAbonnement: Annual cost of the season ticket
outils.kmHintAbonnement: 100% of the cost is deductible (SNCB, STIB, TEC, De Lijn — public operators).
outils.kmFieldIndemnite: Annual km allowance received from the employer
outils.kmHintIndemniteVoiture: If over 0 → automatic switch to the flat rate of 0.15 €/km (CIR 92 art. 66, combining prohibited) + subtraction of the amount received.
outils.kmHintIndemniteAutre: Subtracted from the gross deduction (non-combining rule).
outils.kmHintTelework: Educational: does not reduce the deduction (on-site days are already counted above). Displays the km avoided for information.
outils.kmDisclaimer: Indicative estimate. To optimise your return, run a simulation on Tax-on-web (MyMinfin) or consult your accountant. Actual expenses require supporting documents.
outils.kmFooter: Calculator updated on {date} · 2026 income / EI 2027 · Official sources: , , , .
outils.kmHeadlineTP: Season ticket deducted at 100% — {n} km travelled, for information
outils.kmRecoForfaitTitle: Legal flat rate probably more advantageous
outils.kmRecoFraisReelsBody: Your net km deduction ({montant}) already covers a significant part of the legal flat rate ({forfait}/year). Add your other actual expenses — if the total exceeds it, opt for actual expenses (boxes 1254/2254).
outils.kmRecoForfaitBody: Your net km deduction ({montant}) remains below the automatic legal flat rate ({forfait}/year). The actual-expenses option is only worthwhile if the overall sum exceeds this flat rate.
outils.kmTeleworkBody: {n} km/year saved thanks to your remote-working days. Does not count towards the deduction (days without travel), but reduces your carbon footprint and your actual costs (fuel, vehicle wear).
outils.kmToKnowForfait: The actual-expenses option is only worthwhile if the total professional expenses exceed the legal flat rate of {forfait}/year (CIR 92 art. 51).
outils.kmToKnowVoitureForce: Car rate applied: 0.15 €/km (flat rate CIR 92 art. 66) — your employer pays a km allowance, combining with the civil-servant rate (0.4327 €/km Q2 2026) is not allowed.
outils.kmToKnowVoiture: Car rate applied: 0.4327 €/km (civil-servant rate Q2 2026, BOSA circular no. 764) — no km allowance from the employer. If you receive an allowance, the rate switches automatically to 0.15 €/km.
outils.kmToKnowVelo: Bicycle: 0.37 €/km capped at {plafond}/year (2026 income / EI 2027) — exemption only if your professional expenses are calculated at the flat rate.
outils.kmToKnowTP: Public transport: 100% of the cost of the SNCB / STIB / TEC / De Lijn season ticket deductible (public operators).
outils.kmToKnowTaxOnWeb: Tax-on-web return: allowance received to be entered in box 1254/2254, exemption in 1255/2255. Actual expenses to be detailed in part 2 of the return.
outils.kmPlaceholderText: Enter your journey and your mode of transport, then click « Calculate my deduction ».
outils.kmPlaceholderRates: Car {voiture} €/km · Bicycle {velo} €/km · Public transport 100% season ticket
outils.kmPdfForfaitLine: Legal flat rate CIR 92 art. 51: {forfait} / year — {reco}
outils.kmPdfRecoForfaitTitle: Legal flat rate probably more advantageous
outils.kmPdfRecoFraisReelsBody: Your net kilometre deduction ({montant}) already covers a significant part of the legal flat rate ({forfait}). Add your other actual expenses — if the total exceeds the flat rate, opt for actual expenses in the return (boxes 1254/2254).
outils.kmPdfRecoForfaitBody: Your net kilometre deduction ({montant}) remains below the automatic legal flat rate ({forfait}). The option for actual expenses is only worthwhile if the overall sum (km + other professional expenses) exceeds this flat rate.
outils.kmPdfFooter: Indicative estimate — 2026 scales (2026 income / EI 2027). Car: civil-servant rate Q2 2026 {tauxVoiture} €/km (BOSA circular no. 764) or flat rate CIR 92 art. 66 {tauxForfait} €/km if the employer pays a km allowance. Bicycle {tauxVelo} €/km capped at {plafondVelo}/year. Legal flat rate CIR 92 art. 51: {forfait}/year. Sources: SPF Finances, SPF Mobilité, Moniteur belge.

pro.lpPartnerMetaDesc: The partner space that makes your work and access to legal information easier: tools, resources and contacts centralised to better support your audiences.
pro.lpPartnerHeroLead: Centralise your tools, resources and verified legal information to better guide, inform and support your audiences every day.
pro.lpPartnerBenefitSearchDesc: Quickly find the right tools and information without wasting time.
pro.lpPartnerBenefitCentralDesc: Access all official resources in one place, reliable and up to date.
pro.lpPartnerBenefitGuideDesc: Direct your audiences to the right procedures and the right contacts.
pro.lpPartnerBenefitSupportDesc: Provide clear, precise answers tailored to each situation.
pro.lpPartnerToolOfficeDesc: CPAS, Commune, ONEM, trade unions: find the relevant office near you.
pro.lpPartnerToolU1Desc: Find the relevant institution in each EEA country and in Switzerland.
pro.lpPartnerToolCpasDesc: Complete directory of the CPAS and organisations useful for your audiences.
pro.lpPartnerToolGuidesDesc: Step-by-step guides to understand the procedures and rights.
pro.lpPartnerToolRefDesc: Legal texts, templates and reference materials sorted by theme.
pro.lpPartnerToolDocsDesc: Downloadable forms, certificates and official documents.
pro.lpPartnerSecCentralDesc: Tools, guides and contacts in one place, accessible at any time.
pro.lpPartnerSecUptodateDesc: Official information continuously updated by our experts.
pro.lpPartnerSecExplainDesc: Clear content to easily answer questions.
pro.lpPartnerSecTrackDesc: Find the history and consulted resources at a glance.
pro.lpPartnerFinalTitle: Join the partners who inform and support better with Docbel.
pro.lpEmployerMetaDesc: The employer space that saves you time and money: HR tools, simulations and reliable information to simplify your daily management.
pro.lpEmployerBenefitAdminDesc: Centralise your tasks and automate calculations to save valuable time.
pro.lpEmployerBenefitCostDesc: Avoid errors, optimise your charges and identify the available support.
pro.lpEmployerBenefitDecisionDesc: Simulate, compare and decide with confidence using reliable data.
pro.lpEmployerBenefitHrDesc: Everything you need, in one simple and intuitive space.
pro.lpEmployerToolNoticeDesc: Estimate legal notice periods and compensation.
pro.lpEmployerToolPayrollCostDesc: Calculate the full cost of an employee.
pro.lpEmployerToolLeaveDesc: Manage rights, balances and carry-over easily.
pro.lpEmployerToolAidsDesc: Identify your obligations and the available support.
pro.lpEmployerSecCentralizedDesc: Tools, documents and news, in one place.
pro.lpEmployerSecTimeDesc: Less searching, more action and fewer errors.
pro.lpEmployerSecVisibilityDesc: Steer your HR and your costs with clear indicators.
pro.lpEmployerCtaTitle: Join the companies that simplify their HR management with Docbel.
pro.dashMetaDesc: Manage your social obligations with peace of mind.
pro.dashWelcomeSub: Manage your social obligations in Belgium simply, with reliable, up-to-date tools designed for you.
pro.dashSocialCalendarNote: Indicative dates (quarterly scheme) — sources on the calendar.
pro.dashAlertsEmpty: No alerts. Your files report no required action.
pro.dashStartDesc: The « Can I hire? » assistant guides you step by step and generates the checklist for your hire.
pro.dashActivityEmpty: No recent activity. Your actions (files, documents, simulations) will appear here.
pro.dashWatchHeading: Procedures explained, up to date and sourced
pro.dashWatchBody: Dimona, DmfA, joint committees, minimum wage, student contracts and flexi-job — each fact sheet links to the official texts (ONSS, SPF Employment…).
pro.dashCostNote: Estimated monthly employer cost (gross salary + employer contributions + provisions). Indicative — CP 200 by default.
pro.engageMetaDesc: « Can I hire? » assistant — checklist, alerts and official sources.
pro.engageIntro: A few simple questions to prepare your hire and generate a checklist.
pro.controlMetaDesc: Indicative consistency check of a payslip — detection of potential inconsistencies, without certification.
pro.controlIntro: Enter the data from your payslip: Docbel flags potential inconsistencies. This check is indicative and does not certify the compliance of the payslip.
pro.docsIntro: Generate a fact sheet, a request to the social secretariat or a contract draft. To review, copy, send by email or export as PDF.
pro.costMetaDesc: Estimate the employer cost of a hire (structural, indicative estimate).
pro.costIntro: Estimate the total cost of a hire. Structural and indicative estimate: it does not replace an official payroll calculation by a social secretariat.
pro.libMetaDesc: Educational articles on employer procedures in Belgium: Dimona, DmfA, contracts, student, flexi-job, temporary unemployment and more.
pro.libIntro: Clear, accessible fact sheets on the main procedures of an employer in Belgium. Each fact sheet links to the official sources for the exact rule applicable to your situation.
pro.dossierAlertsEmpty: No alerts. No obvious inconsistency detected.
pro.calMetaDesc: Your upcoming social and tax deadlines (ONSS, withholding tax, VAT).
pro.calIntro: Your upcoming recurring social and tax deadlines.
pro.wizHasEmployeesHelp: Determines whether this is a first hire.
pro.wizHasOnss: Do you already have an ONSS employer number?
pro.wizHasOnssHelp: Without an ONSS number, identification via WIDE may be necessary.
pro.wizCpHelp: Without a CP, the minimum wage cannot be checked precisely.
pro.costsimCpHelp: Without a CP, the sectoral minimum wage cannot be checked.
pro.costsimErrGrossSave: Enter a valid gross salary before saving.
pro.costsimErrGrossExport: Enter a valid gross salary before export.
pro.payslipCpHelp: Without a CP, the minimum pay scale cannot be checked.
pro.payslipRemarkPlaceholder: E.g. flexi framework contract signed, special situation…
pro.payslipVerdictInsufficient: Document insufficient for a reliable check.
pro.contractMissingNote: The contract is still generated with « …… » to complete:
pro.contratsIntro: Compose a Belgian employment contract template: choose the type and scheme, adapt the clauses, complete the information and get a preview ready to review, copy, download or print.
pro.disclaimerGeneral: Docbel is a tool for administrative assistance, simulation and preparation. It does not replace individualised legal advice, an approved social secretariat or the mandatory official declarations of the employer.
pro.disclaimerSimulation: This simulation is indicative and does not constitute an official payroll calculation.
pro.disclaimerChecklist: This checklist is an administrative aid. It must be adapted to your exact situation.
pro.disclaimerDocument: This document is preparatory. Have it validated before official use.
pro.disclaimerControle: Docbel detects potential inconsistencies but does not certify the compliance of a payslip.
pro.checklistSaveError: Unable to save the status. Try again.
pro.bookingSubtitle: Manage your desks, slots and citizen bookings.
pro.bookingEmptyBody: Contact an administrator to get access to a desk.
pro.formationsNewMetaTitle: Create a training course | Employer Space
pro.agrMetaDesc: Calculate the Income Guarantee Allowance from a WECH 506: upload the DRS, automatic calculation, accumulation of up to 4 jobs.
pro.agrIntro: Drop the WECH 506(s): the data is extracted automatically and the income guarantee allowance is calculated. Up to {max} jobs (dual/triple employment).
pro.agrUploadHint: Drag the WECH 506 (AGR) and 505 (temp. unemployment) here, or click
pro.agrUploadSub: PDF · 506 = 1 job · 505 = linked temporary unemployment · max {max}
pro.agrOccupationsDesc: One column per job. Fill in the columns or drop a WECH 506 per job.
pro.agrCodesToSortDesc: These codes are not mapped automatically. Place them in the right field:
pro.agrResultDisclaimer: Gross amounts. The AGR must be at least equal to the ½ allowance. Always check the extracted data before validation.
pro.rdvMetaDescription: Convert a pasted list of appointments (FGTB format) into an Outlook calendar file (.ics).
pro.rdvHistMetaDescription: Consultation of the history of appointments processed by the service.
pro.rdvIntro: Paste the list of appointments as exported (FGTB format). Each person becomes an event in a .ics file that can be imported into Outlook, Google Calendar or Apple Calendar (Europe/Brussels time zone). You can also generate the shift schedule as a PDF: the day is automatically deduced from the date and each day has its colour. Duplicates (people who already have an appointment) are detected and flagged automatically.
pro.rdvPasteDesc: Paste the text as is — no need to reformat anything. You can paste several days at once: each day is saved separately and gets its schedule page.
pro.rdvOrgHelpExport: As an admin, choose the service whose appointments you manage: duplicate detection and saving will apply to its shared history.
pro.rdvSaveBtnTitle: Synchronise the history on the days of the paste (adds the new ones, removes the missing ones)
pro.rdvDetected: {count, plural, one {# appointment detected} other {# appointments detected}}
pro.rdvWaitlistHint: You can paste your waiting list (appointments to approve, with the « approveCancel… » buttons) just to check the duplicates: nothing is saved until you click « Save ».
pro.rdvResyncHint: Re-pasting an updated day (refused or added appointments) then clicking « Save » synchronises the history for that day: the old appointments missing from the new paste are removed. Only the days present in the paste are affected.
pro.rdvPasteFirst: First paste a list of appointments.
pro.rdvNoneDetected: No appointment detected in the pasted text.
pro.rdvChooseOrgMenu: First choose an organisation in the menu above.
pro.rdvNoOrgAttached: No organisation attached to your account — contact an admin.
pro.rdvNetworkErrorConnection: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
pro.rdvDownloadedDesc: {filename} — {count, plural, one {# event ready} other {# events ready}} to import into your calendar.
pro.rdvRemovedAbsent: {count, plural, one {# removed (missing from the new paste)} other {# removed (missing from the new paste)}}
pro.rdvNothingToChange: Nothing to change — the history is already up to date.
pro.rdvSyncSummary: {summary}. Synchronisation over {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}.
pro.rdvPotentialDuplicates: {count, plural, one {# potential duplicate} other {# potential duplicates}}
pro.rdvDuplicatesDesc: Some people have an upcoming appointment, have already had one, or appear several times in this list. Upcoming appointments are in orange (to check before approving), past appointments in grey (information only).
pro.rdvPreviewMeta: {events, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} • {slots, plural, one {# slot} other {# slots}} • Europe/Brussels time zone
pro.rdvHistIntro: Consult the saved appointments (to identify people who have already made an appointment) or update the history by re-pasting the corrected calendar of a day.
pro.rdvOrgHelpHist: Choose the service whose appointments you manage: consultation and updating will apply to its shared history.
pro.rdvSummaryBase: {count, plural, one {# appointment} other {# appointments}} • {people, plural, one {# distinct person} other {# distinct people}}
pro.rdvSummaryPastDup: {count, plural, one {# past duplicate} other {# past duplicates}}
pro.rdvSelectOrgToShow: Select an organisation to display the history.
pro.rdvDupToCheckCount: {count, plural, one {# person with an upcoming appointment and at least one other saved} other {# people with an upcoming appointment and at least one other saved}}
pro.rdvDupPastCount: {count, plural, one {# person who has had several appointments (information)} other {# people who have had several appointments (information)}}
pro.rdvClearDesc: All saved appointments for this organisation will be permanently deleted. This action is irreversible.
pro.rdvEntriesDeleted: {count, plural, one {# entry deleted.} other {# entries deleted.}}
pro.rdvUpdateApplied: Update applied — {removed, plural, one {# removed} other {# removed}}, {added, plural, one {# added} other {# added}}.
pro.rdvAlreadyUpToDate: History already up to date for these days.
pro.rdvDaysRegisteredDesc: {count, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} in the history. « Reload » puts the day's list back into the zone below — you edit it then click « Apply ».
pro.rdvReloadDayTitle: Reload this day into the text zone
pro.rdvUpdateDayDesc: Paste the corrected calendar of one or more days, then click « Apply ». The history of these days is re-synchronised: the people missing from the new paste are removed, the new ones added. The other days are not affected — your tracking of people with several appointments is preserved.
pro.rdvChooseOrgToUpdate: Choose an organisation above to be able to update.
pro.rdvUpdatePreviewMeta: {count} appointments • {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}:
pro.rdvDaysSynced: {count, plural, one {# day synchronised} other {# days synchronised}}
pro.rdvNothingToChangeDays: Nothing to change: the history of these days already matched the paste.

shared.u1Intro: Select a country to see the competent institution where you can request your U1 certificate (formerly E301), the European equivalent of the C4. Data sourced from the <onem>ONEM</onem>.
shared.noInstitutionsHint: The data is not yet in the database. Please try again later.
shared.fmUsageHint: Remove the file from those pages, save them, then try deleting again.
shared.fmPreviewUnsupported: Preview unavailable for this file type
shared.fmVisibilityWarningBody: {name} is currently in a {parent} folder, but you want to make it {target}.
shared.fmVisibilityWarningPrivateHint: The file will be invisible in the public tab, but accessible via its direct URL.
shared.fmVisibilityWarningPublicHint: The file will be visible in the public tab, even if it is in a private folder.
shared.fmConfirmDeleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete {type} “{name}”?
shared.fmFolderMustBeEmpty: The folder must be empty. Empty its contents before deleting it.
shared.fmConfirmBatchDeleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete {count} file(s)?
shared.fmConfirmBatchPrivacyBody: Are you sure you want to make {count} file(s) {target}?
shared.fmBatchPrivacyPrivateHint: The files will disappear from the public tab.
shared.fmBatchPrivacyPublicHint: The files will be visible in the public tab.
shared.fmFolderNotEmptyDesc: The folder must be empty before deletion
shared.fmChildrenNotUpdated: The folder was updated but not all child files
shared.fmCannotDropOnItself: Cannot drop a folder onto itself
shared.fmAlreadyInFolder: The files are already in this folder
